title: [V3.3] Update images
body:
Backport of https://github.com/containers/podman/pull/10829 for the `v3.3` branch

***Depends on***: #11164, #11166

comments.body:
[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *cevich*, *mheon*, *rhatdan* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Fpodman). The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/v3.3/OWNERS)~~ [mheon,rhatdan] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment
Note: I'm going to hold of updating this PR, since the test fixes are so similar to #10829
***IMPORTANT***: I'm okay if this PR merges before #10829 (to help with release timelines) however it makes me nervous.  OTOH, the tests are passing, so :man_shrugging:

LGTM
@mheon, PTAL and merge if it LGTY

/lgtm
(will leave the hold for anyone else to cancel)
